items.title: Shortwave account downgraded to Free plan
items.summary: The VYVE Wellness team account on Shortwave has been automatically downgraded to the Free plan, limiting AI usage and features.
items.actionNeeded: Review billing and decide whether to restore paid Shortwave plan for VYVE team.

items.actionNeeded: Review attached Greenwich report for Infusive GRX week of 05/08-05/14.

items.title: UPQODE confirms email notification process for podcasts
items.summary: UPQODE confirmed that email notification each time new podcast appearances are added to the spreadsheet works best for their team.
items.actionNeeded: No action needed — FYI on communication workflow with UPQODE.

items.title: Interview Valet forwarded Create The Best Me thank you
items.summary: Christina from Interview Valet forwarded a thank-you email from Carmen Hecox regarding Dr. Haas's appearance on the 'Create The Best Me' podcast.
items.actionNeeded: No action needed — FYI on positive podcast feedback.
